message:
refactor: complete frankensqlite migration in remaining src/ and test files

Additional fixes from parallel agents covering:
- src/storage/sqlite.rs: test helpers (col_names, idx_names, analytics)
- src/pages/key_management.rs, export.rs: cfg(test) blocks
- src/indexer/mod.rs, src/lib.rs: test code
- tests/storage_frankensqlite_parity.rs, pages_master_e2e.rs,
  pages_pipeline_e2e.rs, e2e_error_recovery.rs, upgrade/migration.rs

cargo check --tests: 0 errors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -3747,8 +3747,8 @@ mod tests {
             vec![amp_file],
             &[(ConnectorKind::Amp, ScanRoot::local(amp_dir))],
             state.clone(),
-            storage,
-            t_index,
+            storage.clone(),
+            t_index.clone(),
             false,
         )
         .unwrap();
